description: Scan Gmail spam folder, review contents, and permanently delete confirmed spam. Flags suspicious messages for human review.

gmail_account.description: Gmail address to clean spam from

auto_delete_threshold.description: Confidence threshold (0-100) above which spam is auto-flagged for deletion. Messages below threshold are flagged for review.

steps.description: Extract all messages in spam folder

steps.prompt:
You are a spam analysis expert. Review these emails from the Gmail spam folder.

For each email, classify as:
- CONFIRMED_SPAM (confidence 90-100%): Obvious spam, phishing, scam, unwanted marketing from unknown senders
- LIKELY_SPAM (confidence 60-89%): Probably spam but might be legitimate (newsletters you subscribed to, transactional emails)
- REVIEW_NEEDED (confidence below 60%): Could be a real email incorrectly caught by spam filter — DO NOT DELETE

For REVIEW_NEEDED items, explain why it might be legitimate.

Group results:
1. Safe to delete (CONFIRMED_SPAM)
2. Probably safe to delete (LIKELY_SPAM)
3. Needs human review (REVIEW_NEEDED)

Provide the count for each group and total storage that would be freed.
steps.description: Classify spam messages by deletion confidence
Save report to outbox for approval before deletion
